ast.name: innerText
ast.source: Create Tag Page
ast.target: 创建标签页面

ast.name: addOption
ast.source: Start of line
ast.target: 行首

ast.name: addOption
ast.source: End of line
ast.target: 行尾

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The directory in which to create tag pages.
ast.target: 用于创建标签页面的目录。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Designate whether the content should be sorted in descending or ascending order. Defaults to descending (newest content first).
ast.target: 指定内容应按降序还是升序排序。默认降序（最新内容在前）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Text used to separate levels for nested tags. Avoid \\/<>:"|?* and other characters that aren't file-safe, or you won't be able to make pages for nested tags.
ast.target: 用于分隔嵌套标签层级的文本。避免使用 \\/<>:"|?* 及其他不适合文件名的字符，否则无法为嵌套标签创建页面。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Include lines containing the tag in the tag page.
ast.target: 在标签页面中包含含有该标签的行。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Each bit of pulled content will display the full link title as a reference as an end of line. Displays * when false.
ast.target: 每条提取的内容会在行尾显示完整链接标题作为引用。为 false 时显示 *。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Used to detect old tag pages and auto-insert a tag-page block for migration.
ast.target: 用于检测旧标签页面并自动插入标签页面块以便迁移。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose whether the reference link appears at the end (default) or start of each pulled line.
ast.target: 选择引用链接出现在每行提取内容的末尾（默认）还是开头。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Tag page directory
ast.target: 标签页面目录

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Sort content by Date
ast.target: 按日期排序内容

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Nested page separator
ast.target: 嵌套页面分隔符

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Include lines
ast.target: 包含行

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Display full link name as reference
ast.target: 显示完整链接名称作为参考

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Legacy frontmatter key
ast.target: 旧版 frontmatter 键

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Link position
ast.target: 链接位置

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Tag to create page for:
ast.target: 为此标签创建页面：

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Tag Page: no active file to clean up.
ast.target: 标签页面：没有可清理的活动文件。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Tag Page: no legacy marker found in this note.
ast.target: 标签页面：此笔记中未找到旧版标记。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Tag Page: added a tag-page code block to migrate this note. Run "Clean up legacy tag page content" when ready.
ast.target: 标签页面：已添加标签页面代码块以迁移此笔记。准备好后运行“清理旧版标签页面内容”。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Create tag page
ast.target: 创建标签页面

ast.name: name
ast.source: Clean up legacy tag page content
ast.target: 清理旧版标签页面内容

ast.name: text
ast.source: No tags provided. Add `tags: #tag` inside the tag-page code block.
ast.target: 未提供标签。在标签页面代码块内添加 `tags: #tag`。
